_notes.appSlug: lower-kebab; drives npm package name, web app id (<slug>-web), cookie name (<slug>_token), AWS service name.
_notes.primaryRole: The role string this platform introduces. Must be added to microport-contracts roles.ts before launch (Phase 4).
_notes.fkTable: 'users' (@@map snake-plural, like sp/op) OR 'User' (Prisma default, like rp/cp/ep). Pick one; all hand-written SQL must match. feedback_prisma_migration_fk_table_naming_per_repo.
_notes.targetDir: Where to write the new repo, relative to this template. Keep it a sibling of the other satellites.
